visual_description: A man in a light-colored shirt sits in a dimly lit room, looking down at a laptop. Another person is visible in the background, out of focus. The man then looks up, his expression serious, before raising his hands to his head in a gesture of frustration or stress.
audio_description: A rhythmic, percussive beat plays in the background, creating a tense atmosphere.
